protocol.name: ID-JAG Delegation Flow (Human-to-Agent)
protocol.description: Identity Assertion JWT Authorization Grant with human delegation. The agent acts on behalf of a human user using the actor (act) claim to preserve both identities.

entities.name: Human User
entities.description: The principal whose identity is delegated to the agent

entities.name: Identity Provider
entities.description: Authenticates the human user and provides identity claims

entities.name: AI Agent
entities.description: Agent acting on behalf of the human user

entities.name: Assertion Issuer
entities.description: Creates delegated assertions with actor (act) claim

entities.name: Authorization Server
entities.description: Validates assertions and issues access tokens preserving delegation

entities.name: JWKS Endpoint
entities.description: Distributes public keys for signature verification

entities.name: Resource Server
entities.description: Authorizes based on both user identity and actor

phases.name: User Authentication
phases.description: Human user authenticates with identity provider

phases.name: Delegation Setup
phases.description: Create delegated assertion with user as subject and agent as actor

phases.name: Token Exchange
phases.description: Agent exchanges delegated assertion for access token

phases.name: Delegated Resource Access
phases.description: Agent accesses resources on behalf of user

flows.label: Authenticate (OAuth/OIDC/SAML)
flows.description: User authenticates using standard identity protocols

flows.label: Request Agent Action
flows.description: User asks agent to perform an action on their behalf

flows.label: Request Delegated Assertion (user_id, agent_id)
flows.description: Agent requests assertion with user as subject and itself as actor

flows.label: Create JWT: sub=user, act={sub: agent}
flows.description: Build assertion with human identity in 'sub' and agent identity in nested 'act' claim

flows.label: POST /token (grant_type=token-exchange, subject_token=JWT)
flows.description: Exchange delegated assertion for access token

flows.label: Verify Signature + Validate Claims + Check Actor
flows.description: Verify signature, validate claims, and ensure actor delegation is authorized

flows.label: Apply Delegation Policies
flows.description: Check if agent is allowed to act for this user with requested scope

flows.label: Issue Access Token (preserves act claim)
flows.description: Access token contains both user subject and agent actor

flows.label: GET /api/calendar (Authorization: Bearer <token>)
flows.description: Agent calls API on behalf of user

flows.label: Validate Token + Extract sub (user) + Extract act (agent)
flows.description: Resource server sees both who authorized and who is acting

flows.label: Authorize: User has access + Agent allowed to act
flows.description: Authorization based on user permissions and agent trust level

flows.label: Task Completed (Result Summary)
flows.description: Agent returns the result of the delegated action to the user
